title: env_asset_v1 — world-scenery delivery contract (FLAT)
description: The trimmed delivery front door for WORLD SCENERY (terrain tiles, static props, blocking features, water). It is the character external_asset_v2 contract MINUS the hard parts (no rig, no animation/combat clips, no archetype, no calibration gate) PLUS what scenery needs (a `kind`, a `collision` block = an ADR-019 collider, terrain `tiling`). FLAT-only: walkable height-TIERS are a reserved extension (see `tier`, off in v1) that lands with the tiered-terrain bake contract + the engine multi-level ADR. Baked through the SHARED core (the sibling pipeline/env reuses pipeline/tools read-only); env runs its own gate, never the character 42-gate.

variant_id.description: unique id, e.g. ground_arid_v1 / boulder_red_v1 / mesa_wall_v1 / wash_water_v1.

kind.description: terrain = flat walkable ground tile (variant_class:terrain, dir 1, no collider, no world_metrics). prop = static scenery (16-dir sprite + world_metrics; usually non-blocking). blocking_feature = mesa/cliff/boulder/wall (static sprite + hitmask + a SOLID collider, ADR-054). water = flat tile + a sight-AND-movement-blocking collider with an occluder band (ADR-055).

mesh.description: .glb (preferred) or .obj relative to this manifest. STATIC in v1 (no rig).

hitbox.description: optional region_hitboxes sidecar; for scenery usually unused (a feature's collider is the `collision` block below, not per-region body hitboxes).

texture_mode.description: flat_region = material base colours (no bound texture); textured = real painted albedo with real UVs. Same gates as characters (uv_format).

region_source.description: scenery rarely needs body regions; default material_name.

direction_count.description: 1 for a terrain/water tile or a radially-symmetric prop; 16 for a directional prop/feature. Defaults by kind (terrain/water -> 1).

world_metrics.description: REQUIRED for prop + blocking_feature (drives occlusion sort + placement avoidance + the collider span). OMITTED for terrain + water (a ground/water tile is not an occluder/viewer).

tiling.description: terrain/water only. seamless = the tile must repeat edge-to-edge with no visible seam (the env gate verifies via the 3x3 tiling preview).

collision.description: An ADR-019 static collider (ADR-054). REQUIRED for blocking_feature + water; OPTIONAL for prop (default: non-blocking); FORBIDDEN for terrain (walkable ground). A cliff/mesa is a 2D footprint + a TALL occluder, never elevation (ADR-022).

shape.description: circle (radius), aabb (half_extents [hx,hy]), or hitmask (derive the 2D footprint from the baked R8 hitmask).

occluder_height_world.description: VerticalSpan top (m) the LOS uses (ADR-033). For water this is the occluder BAND height that blocks sight across the wash; for a mesa/wall, the visual height.

tier.description: RESERVED — walkable height-tiers (the tiered-terrain bake contract + engine multi-level ADR). NOT VALID in env_asset_v1 (FLAT). Documented here so the schema extends cleanly: a future env_asset_v2 adds tier_height + edge_kind (flat_top | cliff_face | ramp | stair).

not.$comment: trimmed: scenery is static + has no archetype/rig/clips/calibration in v1
